# Crypto Beginner

Crypto Beginner is a free educational platform for learning cryptocurrency, Bitcoin, blockchain, Web3, wallets, DeFi, NFTs, and digital assets.

## Main Resources

- Dashboard: https://cryptobeginner.in/
- Learn: https://cryptobeginner.in/learn
- Dictionary: https://cryptobeginner.in/dictionary
- Blog: https://cryptobeginner.in/blog
- About: https://cryptobeginner.in/about
- Contact: https://cryptobeginner.in/contact
- Sitemap: https://cryptobeginner.in/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://cryptobeginner.in/robots.txt

## Purpose

This website provides beginner-friendly educational content about cryptocurrency and blockchain technology. It is intended for learning and informational purposes only and does not provide financial advice.
